The '''Vagabond Registration Office''' was a branch of the [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] government. From it's name it can be assumed that its purpose was to register immigrants from other planets that did not have a permanent residence. Around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the Vagabond Registration Office was responsible for taking the details of [[Illyan Webble]], a vagrant that had traveled to the planet from [[Kalkovak]]. The office recorded when Webble eventually stole a [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] and piloted it out into the middle of one of Mon Calamari's oceans. When the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Zuckuss/Legends|Zuckuss]] and [[4-LOM/Legends|4-LOM]] arrived on Mon Calamari, they visited the office to pinpoint the location of Webble.
